revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no ja/en source); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-25 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Initial import == <!-- No source talk page found on ja/en Wikipedia at migration time. -->
<!-- Dummy comment to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page. -->

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Acts of Worship); add local discussion section + dated import note
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Acts of Worship); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-25 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:06, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:45, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1338095360 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:06, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Acts of Worship | revid=1338095360 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C|1= {{WikiProject Novels |importance= Low |attention= |short-story-task-force= yes}} {{WikiProject Japan |importance=low|bibliography=y}} {{WikiProject Books}} {{WikiProject Literature |importance=Low}} }}
== Misleading title/structure ==
The intro to the article and the picture attached of the First Edition suggest that this article is about the Japanese version of the book. However, the description of the stories included in the book are those of the translated version "Acts of Worship (Seven Stories)" which has a different composition.
The Japanese version has 4 stories: 三熊野詣、月澹荘奇譚、孔雀、朝の純愛. The English/translated version has the 7 stories currently listed on the page. The only overlap is in the inclusion of 三熊野詣 as the central work and name of the collection.
I'm not sure if this was considered when the page was initially created but it seems it would be worth distinguishing the two or making it clearer that the page is about the English version which is by and large a separate work/not simply a translation of the Japanese version. [[User:Toldfinger1|Toldfinger1]] ([[User talk:Toldfinger1|talk]]) 13:29, 14 February 2023 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:06, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Poorly written synopsis section ==
The synopsis section is written in a non encyclopedic manner. Reading it will be enough to understand the problem. [[Special:Contributions/~2026-98999-5|~2026-98999-5]] ([[User talk:~2026-98999-5|talk]]) 05:19, 13 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:06, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

== Misleading title/structure ==
The intro to the article and the picture attached of the First Edition suggest that this article is about the Japanese version of the book. However, the description of the stories included in the book are those of the translated version "Acts of Worship (Seven Stories)" which has a different composition.
The Japanese version has 4 stories: 三熊野詣、月澹荘奇譚、孔雀、朝の純愛. The English/translated version has the 7 stories currently listed on the page. The only overlap is in the inclusion of 三熊野詣 as the central work and name of the collection.
I'm not sure if this was considered when the page was initially created but it seems it would be worth distinguishing the two or making it clearer that the page is about the English version which is by and large a separate work/not simply a translation of the Japanese version. [[User:Toldfinger1|Toldfinger1]] ([[User talk:Toldfinger1|talk]]) 13:29, 14 February 2023 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:40, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Poorly written synopsis section ==
The synopsis section is written in a non encyclopedic manner. Reading it will be enough to understand the problem. == Misleading title/structure ==
The intro to the article and the picture attached of the First Edition suggest that this article is about the Japanese version of the book. However, the description of the stories included in the book are those of the translated version "Acts of Worship (Seven Stories)" which has a different composition.
The Japanese version has 4 stories: 三熊野詣、月澹荘奇譚、孔雀、朝の純愛. The English/translated version has the 7 stories currently listed on the page. The only overlap is in the inclusion of 三熊野詣 as the central work and name of the collection.
I'm not sure if this was considered when the page was initially created but it seems it would be worth distinguishing the two or making it clearer that the page is about the English version which is by and large a separate work/not simply a translation of the Japanese version. [[User:Toldfinger1|Toldfinger1]] ([[User talk:Toldfinger1|talk]]) 13:29, 14 February 2023 (UTC)

The synopsis section is written in a non encyclopedic manner. Reading it will be enough to understand the problem. == Misleading title/structure ==
The intro to the article and the picture attached of the First Edition suggest that this article is about the Japanese version of the book. However, the description of the stories included in the book are those of the translated version "Acts of Worship (Seven Stories)" which has a different composition.
The Japanese version has 4 stories: 三熊野詣、月澹荘奇譚、孔雀、朝の純愛. The English/translated version has the 7 stories currently listed on the page. The only overlap is in the inclusion of 三熊野詣 as the central work and name of the collection.
I'm not sure if this was considered when the page was initially created but it seems it would be worth distinguishing the two or making it clearer that the page is about the English version which is by and large a separate work/not simply a translation of the Japanese version. [[User:Toldfinger1|Toldfinger1]] ([[User talk:Toldfinger1|talk]]) 13:29, 14 February 2023 (UTC)

== Misleading title/structure ==
The intro to the article and the picture attached of the First Edition suggest that this article is about the Japanese version of the book. However, the description of the stories included in the book are those of the translated version "Acts of Worship (Seven Stories)" which has a different composition.
The Japanese version has 4 stories: 三熊野詣、月澹荘奇譚、孔雀、朝の純愛. The English/translated version has the 7 stories currently listed on the page. The only overlap is in the inclusion of 三熊野詣 as the central work and name of the collection.
I'm not sure if this was considered when the page was initially created but it seems it would be worth distinguishing the two or making it clearer that the page is about the English version which is by and large a separate work/not simply a translation of the Japanese version. == Misleading title/structure ==
The intro to the article and the picture attached of the First Edition suggest that this article is about the Japanese version of the book. However, the description of the stories included in the book are those of the translated version "Acts of Worship (Seven Stories)" which has a different composition.
The Japanese version has 4 stories: 三熊野詣、月澹荘奇譚、孔雀、朝の純愛. The English/translated version has the 7 stories currently listed on the page. The only overlap is in the inclusion of 三熊野詣 as the central work and name of the collection.
I'm not sure if this was considered when the page was initially created but it seems it would be worth distinguishing the two or making it clearer that the page is about the English version which is by and large a separate work/not simply a translation of the Japanese version. [[User:Toldfinger1|Toldfinger1]] ([[User talk:Toldfinger1|talk]]) 13:29, 14 February 2023 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:28, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Poorly written synopsis section ==

== Misleading title/structure ==
The intro to the article and the picture attached of the First Edition suggest that this article is about the Japanese version of the book. However, the description of the stories included in the book are those of the translated version "Acts of Worship (Seven Stories)" which has a different composition.
The Japanese version has 4 stories: 三熊野詣、月澹荘奇譚、孔雀、朝の純愛. The English/translated version has the 7 stories currently listed on the page. The only overlap is in the inclusion of 三熊野詣 as the central work and name of the collection.
I'm not sure if this was considered when the page was initially created but it seems it would be worth distinguishing the two or making it clearer that the page is about the English version which is by and large a separate work/not simply a translation of the Japanese version.
